productDisplayName: Gini Jony Boys Polo Black T-Shirt
description: Style Note Let your little man enjoy some style in his outfits and reach a step closer to his dreams with this polo T-shirt from gini and jony, decorated with appliqué and print. Team it with shorts and comfy footwear for that uber cool and comfy look. Product Details Black polo T-shirt, has short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, graphic print and appliqué on the chest and graphic print at the back and brand tag on the hem Material and care 100% cotton Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations
